item.title: 32 Degrees Recalls Heated Socks Due to Burn Hazard
item.company: Costco stores and online at Costco.com from August 2025 through March 2026 for between $30 and $46.
item.brand: Costco stores and online at Costco.com from August 2025 through March 2026 for between $30 and $46.
item.summary: This recall involves heated socks sold in three sizes (medium, large, extra large), all in the color black. "32° HEAT" appears on the battery pack casing, battery pack packaging, user manual and the exterior retail packaging for the products.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: 32 Degrees Heated Socks.
item.remedy: Consumers should immediately stop using the heated socks and return them to Costco for a full refund.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
